Interface Formatter<S,V>

Type Parameters:
S - the style type of the node
V - the value type
public interface Formatter<S,V>
An interface used to format (style) nodes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    format(org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Tag tag, V value, NodeRole role, S def)
    Returns the format to use for the given node.
    static <S,V> Formatter<S,V>
    identity()
    Returns a formatter which returns the default style, as given to the method (as configured by the respective setting).

  • Method Details

    • format

      @NotNull S format(@NotNull org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Tag tag, @NotNull V value, @NotNull NodeRole role, @NotNull S def)
      Returns the format to use for the given node.

      Please note that the returned style might be overridden in order to produce output compliant with the YAML specification. Please learn more at the corresponding setting documentation.

      Parameters:
      tag - the actual datatype the node is representing
      value - value of the node (for scalars, this is a string-based representation)
      role - role of the node
      def - the default style (as configured by the respective setting)
      Returns:
      the style to use for the node

    • identity

      @NotNull static <S,V> Formatter<S,V> identity()
      Returns a formatter which returns the default style, as given to the method (as configured by the respective setting).
      Type Parameters:
      S - the style type of the node
      V - the value type
      Returns:
      the identity formatter
